```javascript
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
    const basePath = '/tmp/resources';
    const normalizedBasePath = path.normalize(basePath);

    const filePath = path.join(normalizedBasePath, themeName, 'config.json');
    const normalizedPath = path.normalize(filePath);

    const relativePath = path.relative(normalizedBasePath, normalizedPath);
    if (relativePath.startsWith('..')) {
        throw new Error('Invalid theme name');
    }

    const configData = fs.readFileSync(normalizedPath, 'utf8');

    return configData;
}

module.exports = {readThemeConfig};
```

```xml
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
    const basePath = '/tmp/resources';
    const normalizedBasePath = path.normalize(basePath);

    const filePath = path.join(normalizedBasePath, themeName, 'config.json');
    const normalizedPath = path.normalize(filePath);

    const relativePath = path.relative(normalizedBasePath, normalizedPath);
    if (relativePath.startsWith('..')) {
        throw new Error('Invalid theme name');
    }

    const configData = fs.readFileSync(normalizedPath, 'utf8');

    return configData;
}

module.exports = {readThemeConfig};
```

```javascript
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
    // Validate that themeName is provided and is a string
    if (typeof themeName !== 'string' || !themeName || themeName.trim() === '') {
        throw new Error('themeName must be a non-empty string');
    }
    
    // Sanitize the themeName to prevent path traversal attacks
    // path.basename will strip any directory components
    const sanitizedThemeName = path.basename(themeName);
    
    // Define base path and config file name
    const basePath = '/tmp/resources';
    const configFileName = 'config.json';
    
    // Construct the full file path using path.join
    const filePath = path.join(basePath, sanitizedThemeName, configFileName);
    
    // Additional security check: ensure the resolved path is within the base directory
    const resolvedBasePath = path.resolve(basePath);
    const resolvedFilePath = path.resolve(filePath);
    
    if (!resolvedFilePath.startsWith(resolvedBasePath + path.sep)) {
        throw new Error('Invalid theme path: path traversal detected');
    }
    
    try {
        // Read the configuration file synchronously
        const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8');
        return content;
    } catch (error) {
        // Handle specific error cases without exposing system details
        if (error.code === 'ENOENT') {
            throw new Error(`Theme configuration not found for: ${sanitizedThemeName}`);
        } else if (error.code === 'EACCES') {
            throw new Error(`Permission denied reading theme configuration`);
        } else {
            throw new Error(`Failed to read theme configuration`);
        }
    }
}

module.exports = { readThemeConfig };
```

```javascript
<fixed_code>
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
    const basePath = '/tmp/resources';
    
    // Reject absolute paths in themeName to prevent escaping the base directory
    if (path.isAbsolute(themeName)) {
        throw new Error('Theme name must not be an absolute path');
    }

    // Construct the full path safely
    const fullPath = path.join(basePath, themeName, 'config.json');
    const resolvedBase = path.resolve(basePath);
    const resolvedFullPath = path.resolve(fullPath);

    // Verify the resolved path is within the base directory
    const relativePath = path.relative(resolvedBase, resolvedFullPath);
    if (relativePath.startsWith('..')) {
        throw new Error('Invalid theme path');
    }

    // Read the theme configuration file
    const configData = fs.readFileSync(resolvedFullPath, 'utf8');
    return configData;
}

module.exports = {readThemeConfig};
</fixed_code>
```

```javascript
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
```
```javascript
    // Validate themeName to prevent path traversal
    if (!themeName || typeof themeName !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('Theme name must be a non-empty string');
    }

    if (themeName.includes('/') || themeName.includes('\\')) {
        throw new Error('Theme name must not contain path separators');
    }

    if (themeName === '.' || themeName === '..') {
        throw new Error('Theme name cannot be "." or ".."');
    }

    // Construct the full path to the theme configuration file
    const configPath = path.join('/tmp/resources', themeName, 'config.json');

    // Read the theme configuration file
    const configData = fs.readFileSync(configPath, 'utf8');

    return configData;
}

module.exports = {readThemeConfig};
```

```xml
<fixed_code>
const path = require('path');
const fs = require('fs');

const baseDir = '/tmp/resources';

function readThemeConfig(themeName) {
    const filePath = path.join(baseDir, themeName, 'config.json');
    const resolvedPath = path.resolve(filePath);
    
    if (!resolvedPath.startsWith(baseDir)) {
        throw new Error('Invalid theme name: path is outside the allowed directory');
    }
    
    return fs.readFileSync(resolvedPath, 'utf8');
}

module.exports = { readThemeConfig };
</fixed_code>
```
